IXACTSoundBank::CreateWmaPlayList

Create a WMA playlist.

HRESULT CreateWmaPlayList(
    DWORD dwSoundCueIndex,
    DWORD dwPlaybackFlags,
    PXACTWMAPLAYLIST *ppWmaPlayList
);

Parameters

dwSoundCueIndex
[in] Sound cue index to play.
dwPlaybackFlags
[in] Flags for creation of the playlist. Can be zero or any combination of the following:
Value Description
XACT_FLAG_WMAPLAYLIST_PLAYBACK_RANDOM Indicates that songs should be shuffled before playback.
XACT_FLAG_WMAPLAYLIST_PLAYBACK_LOOP Indicates playlist should loop upon completion of playback.
ppWmaPlayList
[out] A pointer to a WMA playlist returned.

Return Values

Returns DS_OK if successful; returns an error code otherwise.

Remarks

When only the XACT_FLAG_WMAPLAYLIST_PLAYBACK_LOOP flag is specified, the entire playlist will be played sequentially then start from the beginning of the playlist again.

When only the XACT_FLAG_WMAPLAYLIST_PLAYBACK_RANDOM flag is specified, the entire playlist will be played in random order (each track played once, with no repeats) and then stop.

When both flags are specified, the songs will be played in random order then playback will start from the beginning of the playlist.

To re-shuffle playlist for random playback, call IXACTWmaPlayList::SetPlaybackBehavior and specify the XACT_FLAG_WMAPLAYLIST_PLAYBACK_RANDOM flag.

Playlists cannot be released after the sound bank has been destroyed. However, a playlist can be released before the sound bank is destroyed, or will be released automatically when the sound bank is destroyed.

Requirements

Header: Declared in XACT.h.

Import Library: Use XACTEng.lib.

See Also

IXACTSoundSource, IXACTWmaPlayList
